positive: Minimalist silhouette of a celestial map overlaid with stylized, bioluminescent nebula swirls. The main subject is a stylized mountain range profile intersecting constellations (Ursa Major, Orion, Cassiopeia) depicted in clean linework. Use a limited palette of deep sapphire blues, cosmic violets, electric teal, and stark white. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly detailed for a circular crop. The overall style should be vector-graphic, negative space heavy, with a strong emphasis on bold lines and high contrast. Studio shot, digital illustration, perfect symmetry, 4k print quality.
